# NJ Developments

> Connecticut-based web development and business automation studio serving HVAC, roofing, electrical, tree, and other service contractors across all 8 CT counties.

NJ Developments LLC builds fast, conversion-focused websites and layers AI automation on top: AI voice agents for 24/7 call coverage, automated Google review requests, and lead follow-up systems. Also operates under the DBA **CT Digital Solutions** (ctdigitalsolutions.com).

## What we do

- **Contractor Websites** — Static, fast, mobile-first sites built to rank on Google and convert visitors into booked jobs.
- **AI Voice Agents** — 24/7 phone coverage that captures lead details and texts them to the owner.
- **Review Automation** — Automatic post-job Google review requests.
- **Lead Follow-Up** — Automated SMS follow-ups so no inquiry slips.
- **Google & Local SEO** — Google Business Profile, local rankings, monthly reporting.
- **Custom Portals & Internal Tools** — Dashboards, client portals, job tracking.
- **Marketing & Ads** — Google Ads and social advertising.
- **Ongoing Support** — Hosting, updates, monthly performance check-ins.

## How to engage

- Book a call: https://nj-developments.com/contact
- Portfolio: https://nj-developments.com/portfolio
- Services detail: https://nj-developments.com/services
- Blog: https://nj-developments.com/blog

## Featured guides

- [How to Hire a Web Designer in Connecticut — 2026 Buyer's Guide](https://nj-developments.com/blog-how-to-hire-web-designer-connecticut): Practical guide to pricing tiers, what to ask, red flags, and how to match a CT web designer to your scope.
- [Web Design Agency Serving Hartford, New Haven, Stamford & All of CT](https://nj-developments.com/blog-web-design-connecticut-towns): Town-by-town breakdown of CT web design coverage.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://nj-developments.com/): Overview and primary CTAs.
- [Services](https://nj-developments.com/services): Full service catalog with descriptions.
- [Portfolio](https://nj-developments.com/portfolio): Past client work.
- [About](https://nj-developments.com/about): Team and company background.
- [Contact](https://nj-developments.com/contact): Contact form and booking.

## Pricing

Typical engagements start around $1,500 for a website build plus $150/month for ongoing support. Custom automation, AI voice agents, and larger platforms are quoted individually.

## Service area

All 8 Connecticut counties: Fairfield, Hartford, Litchfield, Middlesex, New Haven, New London, Tolland, Windham.

## Team

Small founder-led team based in Connecticut. Founder: Jamiah Bartlett.

## Contact

- Website: https://nj-developments.com
- Contact form: https://nj-developments.com/contact
